use_cases: Displaying status indicators like positive/negative states in dashboards
Showing categorical labels or tags on content items
Indicating semantic information like warnings, info messages, or destructive actions
Creating notification counts or feature labels
Adding contextual metadata to UI elements with hover states for linked badges
ai_summary: A flexible badge component with 9 semantic variants (default, secondary, destructive, outline, warning, info, neutral, positive, negative) for displaying status indicators, tags, and categorical labels. Built with CVA for variant management and Radix UI Slot for polymorphic composition, featuring accessible focus states and hover behaviors for linked usage.
